title: On load, Board mode shows at least 8 seeded scene cards with images and descriptions
After creating a scene titled 'Harbor Opening' with valid required fields, the text 'Harbor Opening' is visible on the board
After adding 3 new scenes on top of the seed set, the board shows exactly 3 more scenes than the initial seeded count
After switching to Slide (Tutorial) mode, a single centered active scene is visible with navigation affordances
After editing a scene description/title to 'Evening Cutaway', the text 'Evening Cutaway' is visible and the previous text is not
After deleting a scene, that scene's title/description is no longer visible on the board
After deleting all scenes, an empty state is visible on the board
After submitting create with an empty required title/description, the scenes count does not increase and validation feedback is visible
After switching among Tile, List, and Slide view modes, the scene set re-layouts without full page navigation
After advancing prev/next in Slide mode (when multiple scenes exist), the active scene index changes and the centered scene updates
When hovering scene cards, mode toggles, or header controls, a visible hover lift, wash, or shadow change appears
Welcome to Docs! is visible in the workspace chrome on load
